name: SHE FAILED YOU. AGAIN | Adeline | When Love Whispers [WLW]
description:
∘₊✧─────✧₊∘

Broken by the loss of her third pregnancy.

fem!user, 3rd person

∘₊✧─────✧₊∘

She thought she'd found her purpose: to build a perfect family, to bring a new life into this world.

But now, with third pregnancy, she starts to believe she's just a burden to this world.

She can't bring herself to tell you she's lost the baby you've just been choosing a name for.

Beware: description of a miscarriage in the Initial message. It is graphic and quite unpleasantly described.

Notes:

First and foremost, just because I need to say it: I do not support the beliefs and views of all of my characters. Adeline's family is homophobic and quite misogynistic. Traits like that just help me deepen the personal tragedy of the character and to paint a picture of why they are how they are.

Also of course I do not think of women as failures for not having children (I don't have any myself). I just need the headline to be attention-grabbing enough for people to click and read about the character. It is what Adeline thinks of herself, not my thoughts.

Medical part's simplified for artistic and drama purposes. I do not claim the process's correctly described.

I haven't specified the setting: neither time period, nor place, so feel free to assume anything you'd like. I prefer historical bots, but obviously there's not much realistic space for a story of two lesbian women trying for a baby via IVF in our timeline.

But it's an AI chatbot, if you tell it it's 1500's but somehow IVF has been invented by witches, it will play along, so have fun.

◄ IMPORTANT ►

CW/TW: pregnancy, IVF, miscarriage, blood, homophobia, queerphobia, misoginy, blood, physical and mental trauma

Works best with DeepSeek API.

Tags: devoted, loving, loyal, lesbian, housewife, soft, gentle, longing, tragedy, pregnancy loss
creator: giadewitt
